subcodes.first_line: God willing, thou hast ever quaffed, and wilt continue to quaff, from the choice wine of divine knowledge and the pure nectar of the All-Merciful's love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم تزل و لاتزال از صهبای عرفان الهی و رحیق محبت رحمانی بیاشامی و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
